title: microsorum submarginale
intro: Microsorum submarginale, also known as Java Fern or Water Clover, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Microsorum submarginale include its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Microsorum submarginale can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them as a tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
